hero.descriptionLine1: Experience travel planning powered by artificial intelligence.
hero.descriptionLine2: Personalized itineraries crafted just for you.
hero.placeholder: Where do you want to go?
features.heading: Why Triver?
features.subheading: Discover how AI transforms every step of your travel planning into a seamless, personalized experience.
features.hyperPersonalized.title: Hyper-Personalized Recommendations
features.hyperPersonalized.description: Our AI analyzes your preferences, past trips, and travel style to suggest destinations and activities that perfectly match your interests.
features.smartItinerary.title: Smart Itinerary Builder
features.smartItinerary.description: Automatically generates optimized day-by-day itineraries considering travel time, opening hours, and your energy levels.
features.integratedBooking.title: Integrated Booking Experience
features.integratedBooking.description: Seamlessly book flights, hotels, and experiences in one place. Real-time pricing and availability at your fingertips.
destinations.heading: Explore Seoul
destinations.subheading: Discover the best places in Seoul curated by AI
cta.heading: Ready to Start Your
cta.description: Join thousands of travelers who have discovered their perfect trip with Triver's AI-powered planning.
reviews.heading: Traveler Stories
reviews.subheading: See what our community has to say about their experiences with Triver.
